steps.title: Welcome to Techtoby Corp
steps.description: Your all-in-one toolkit for Welcome to Bloxburg. Manage businesses, create whiteboard decals, build family trees, and more — all from one place.

steps.title: Your Desktop
steps.description: The home screen works like a real desktop. Click any app icon to open it. Right-click the desktop for options like customizing the layout.

steps.title: Apps & Tools
steps.description: Each app is purpose-built for Bloxburg players. From the Business Manager to the Whiteboard, everything is designed to help you plan, organize, and create.

steps.title: Profiles
steps.description: Head to Settings to create player profiles. Each profile stores its own data, so you can easily switch between different Bloxburg accounts or save files.

steps.title: Your Data, Your Control
steps.description: All your data is stored locally in your browser. Use Settings to export or import your data if you want to back it up or transfer it to another device.
